requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——无线电频率性能（EN/ETSI，ATK）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——無線電頻率性能（EN/ETSI，ATK）

summary.en: Bosnia and Herzegovina aligns with EN/ETSI harmonised standards for radio frequency performance testing as part of its EU accession candidacy (applied 2022). ATK (Agencija za tehničku kontrolu — Agency for Technical Certification) handles general product conformity and safety, while RAK type approval requires RF performance test reports based on EN/ETSI standards. Standards include EN 300 328 (2.4 GHz Wi-Fi / Bluetooth) and EN 301 893 (5 GHz Wi-Fi). RAK manages frequency spectrum aligned with the ITU and EU radio frequency decisions. Chinese investment in BiH infrastructure (the 'Highway of Peace' and related projects) underscores commercial interest, but regulatory pathways remain EU-aligned.
summary.zh: 波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那作为欧盟入盟候选国（2022年申请），在无线电频率性能测试方面与EN/ETSI协调标准对标。ATK（技术控制局）负责通用产品符合性和安全，而RAK型式核准要求基于EN/ETSI标准的射频性能检测报告。相关标准包括EN 300 328（2.4GHz Wi-Fi/蓝牙）和EN 301 893（5GHz Wi-Fi）。RAK参照ITU和欧盟无线电频率决策管理频谱。中国在波黑的基础设施投资（"和平公路"等项目）凸显了商业利益，但监管路径仍与欧盟对标。
summary.zht: 波士尼亞與赫塞哥維納作為歐盟入盟候選國（2022年申請），在無線電頻率性能測試方面與EN/ETSI協調標準對標。ATK（技術控制局）負責通用產品符合性和安全，而RAK型式核准要求基於EN/ETSI標準的射頻性能測試報告。相關標準包括EN 300 328（2.4GHz Wi-Fi/藍牙）和EN 301 893（5GHz Wi-Fi）。RAK參照ITU和歐盟無線電頻率決策管理頻譜。中國在波黑的基礎設施投資（「和平公路」等項目）凸顯了商業利益，但監管路徑仍與歐盟對標。

standards_or_laws: EN 300 328 V2.2.2 — Wideband transmission systems; 2.4 GHz ISM band (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth)
EN 301 893 V2.1.1 — 5 GHz high-performance RLAN (Wi-Fi 5/6)
EN 300 440 V2.2.1 — Short range devices (868 MHz, 433 MHz IoT)
EN 301 908-1 — IMT cellular networks (LTE)
ATK (Agencija za tehničku kontrolu) — product conformity and technical certification
RAK (Regulatorna agencija za komunikacije) — spectrum management and type approval

summary.en: China's SRRC radio type approval process applies MIIT-mandated technical requirements based on GB/T and YD/T standards for frequency performance. These are not harmonised with ETSI/EN standards. SRRC approval covers frequency, modulation, and transmitter power requirements specific to China's allocated spectrum.
summary.zh: 中国SRRC无线电型式核准流程基于工业和信息化部规定的技术要求，采用GB/T和YD/T标准进行频率性能测试，与ETSI/EN标准不协调。SRRC核准涵盖中国分配频谱特有的频率、调制及发射功率要求。
summary.zht: 中國SRRC無線電型式核准流程基於工業和信息化部規定的技術要求，採用GB/T和YD/T標準進行頻率性能測試，與ETSI/EN標準不協調。SRRC核准涵蓋中國分配頻譜特有的頻率、調製及發射功率要求。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — 无线电发射设备型号核准
YD/T 1214-2006 (2.4 GHz WLAN technical requirements)
YD/T 1432-2017 (5 GHz WLAN technical requirements)
GB 15629.11 / IEEE 802.11 aligned national standards
MIIT spectrum management regulations (frequency allocation table)

gap.en: SRRC approval and GB/YD standards are not recognised by RAK. New RF performance testing to EN/ETSI standards is required for RAK type approval. If the product already holds CE marking with EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports, RAK generally accepts those reports, significantly reducing re-testing costs. Products without prior CE testing must commission fresh EN/ETSI tests from an accredited laboratory. ATK conformity certification for general product safety is a parallel requirement to the RAK radio type approval.
gap.zh: SRRC核准及GB/YD标准不被RAK认可。RAK型式核准要求按EN/ETSI标准进行新的射频性能测试。若产品已持有CE标志，并附有EN 300 328/EN 301 893检测报告，RAK通常接受这些报告，可显著降低重新测试成本。无CE测试经历的产品须委托经认可实验室进行全新EN/ETSI测试。ATK通用产品安全符合性认证是与RAK无线电型式核准并行的要求。
gap.zht: SRRC核准及GB/YD標準不被RAK認可。RAK型式核准要求按EN/ETSI標準進行新的射頻性能測試。若產品已持有CE標誌，並附有EN 300 328/EN 301 893測試報告，RAK通常接受這些報告，可顯著降低重新測試成本。無CE測試經歷的產品須委託經認可實驗室進行全新EN/ETSI測試。ATK通用產品安全符合性認證是與RAK無線電型式核准並行的要求。

source.publisher: RAK — Regulatory Agency for Communications of Bosnia and Herzegovina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RF performance testing to EN/ETSI standards is mandatory as the technical basis for RAK type approval in Bosnia and Herzegovina. SRRC approval is not recognised. Existing EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 test reports from CE certification are generally reusable for RAK, but confirm format and accreditation scope acceptance with RAK or a local representative. ATK general product conformity requirements apply in parallel.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按EN/ETSI标准进行的射频性能测试是波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那RAK型式核准技术依据的强制要求。SRRC核准不被认可。CE认证中的EN 300 328/EN 301 893检测报告通常可在RAK申请中复用，但请向RAK或本地代表确认特定检测报告格式和认可范围是否被接受。ATK通用产品符合性要求同时适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按EN/ETSI標準進行的射頻性能測試是波士尼亞與赫塞哥維納RAK型式核准技術依據的強制要求。SRRC核准不被認可。CE認證中的EN 300 328/EN 301 893測試報告通常可在RAK申請中複用，但請向RAK或本地代表確認特定測試報告格式和認可範圍是否被接受。ATK通用產品符合性要求同時適用。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Conducted and Radiated Emissions (EN 301 489, ATK)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——传导与辐射骚扰（EN 301 489，ATK）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——傳導與輻射騷擾（EN 301 489，ATK）

summary.en: EMC requirements for conducted and radiated disturbance emissions from radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment in Bosnia and Herzegovina are based on EN 301 489-1 (general EMC requirements for radio equipment) and product-specific EN 301 489-x companion standards, consistent with EU practice. ATK (Agencija za tehničku kontrolu) handles product conformity assessment. Compliance with these EMC standards must be demonstrated as part of the RAK type approval application and ATK conformity assessment process. BiH's EU candidacy means progressive alignment with EU EMC requirements.
summary.zh: 波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那无线电设备和电信终端设备的传导与辐射骚扰电磁兼容要求，基于EN 301 489-1（无线电设备通用电磁兼容要求）及产品专用EN 301 489-x配套标准，与欧盟做法一致。ATK（技术控制局）负责产品符合性评定。须作为RAK型式核准申请和ATK符合性评定流程的一部分验证对这些电磁兼容标准的符合性。波黑的欧盟候选国地位意味着将逐步与欧盟电磁兼容要求对标。
summary.zht: 波士尼亞與赫塞哥維納無線電設備和電信終端設備的傳導與輻射騷擾電磁相容要求，基於EN 301 489-1（無線電設備通用電磁相容要求）及產品專用EN 301 489-x配套標準，與歐盟做法一致。ATK（技術控制局）負責產品符合性評定。須作為RAK型式核准申請和ATK符合性評定流程的一部分驗證對這些電磁相容標準的符合性。波黑的歐盟候選國地位意味著將逐步與歐盟電磁相容要求對標。

standards_or_laws: EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3 — EMC standard for radio equipment; Part 1: Common technical requirements
EN 301 489-17 V3.2.4 — EMC specific conditions for wideband data and HIPERLAN equipment (Wi-Fi / BT)
EN 301 489-3 — Short range devices (SRD)
EN 301 489-52 — Cellular / LTE terminal equipment
ATK (Agencija za tehničku kontrolu) — BiH product conformity assessment body

summary.en: China applies GB/T 9254.1-2021 for radiated and conducted emissions from information technology and telecom equipment, and GB 17625.1-2022 for harmonic current emissions. These are mandatory national standards distinct from and not interchangeable with the EN 301 489 series.
summary.zh: 中国对信息技术和电信设备的辐射与传导骚扰适用GB/T 9254.1-2021，对谐波电流骚扰适用GB 17625.1-2022，均为强制性国家标准，与EN 301 489系列不同且不可互换。
summary.zht: 中國對信息技術和電信設備的輻射與傳導騷擾適用GB/T 9254.1-2021，對諧波電流騷擾適用GB 17625.1-2022，均為強制性國家標準，與EN 301 489系列不同且不可互換。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics
GB 17625.1-2022 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Harmonic current emissions (IEC 61000-3-2)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Limits and methods of measurement of immunity characteristics (IEC 61000-4 series)

gap.en: GB/T 9254 and GB 17625 test data are not accepted by RAK or ATK in place of EN 301 489 series reports. If the product already has CE-compliant EN 301 489-1 / EN 301 489-17 test reports, RAK and ATK generally accept these. Without prior CE testing, new EN 301 489 tests must be commissioned from an accredited laboratory. The EN 301 489 series measures different disturbance limits and test methods compared with GB/T 9254, so results are not directly transferable.
gap.zh: GB/T 9254和GB 17625测试数据不被RAK或ATK接受以替代EN 301 489系列报告。若产品已持有CE符合的EN 301 489-1/EN 301 489-17检测报告，RAK和ATK通常接受。无CE测试经历的产品须委托经认可实验室进行新的EN 301 489测试。EN 301 489系列与GB/T 9254在骚扰限值和测试方法上存在差异，结果不可直接转用。
gap.zht: GB/T 9254和GB 17625測試數據不被RAK或ATK接受以替代EN 301 489系列報告。若產品已持有CE符合的EN 301 489-1/EN 301 489-17測試報告，RAK和ATK通常接受。無CE測試經歷的產品須委託經認可實驗室進行新的EN 301 489測試。EN 301 489系列與GB/T 9254在騷擾限值和測試方法上存在差異，結果不可直接轉用。

source.publisher: ATK — Agency for Technical Certification of Bosnia and Herzegovina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EN 301 489-series EMC compliance is mandatory for RAK type approval and ATK product conformity assessment in Bosnia and Herzegovina. GB/T 9254 or GB 17625 test reports are not accepted. Existing EN 301 489 CE test reports can typically be reused for RAK/ATK applications, reducing costs; confirm format and scope acceptance with RAK or ATK before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EN 301 489系列电磁兼容合规性是波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那RAK型式核准和ATK产品符合性评定的强制要求。GB/T 9254或GB 17625检测报告不被接受。现有的EN 301 489 CE测试报告通常可在RAK/ATK申请中复用以降低成本；提交前请向RAK或ATK确认格式和范围是否被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EN 301 489系列電磁相容合規性是波士尼亞與赫塞哥維納RAK型式核准和ATK產品符合性評定的強制要求。GB/T 9254或GB 17625測試報告不被接受。現有的EN 301 489 CE測試報告通常可在RAK/ATK申請中複用以降低成本；提交前請向RAK或ATK確認格式和範圍是否被接受。
